patch.value: SDK testing-helper input validation: runRegisteredCommandForTest positional misuse crashes; createExtensionTestHarness accepts non-extension module silently

2026-07-04 sandbox audit: (1) runRegisteredCommandForTest(activation, 'name', opts) — positional command instead of {command} — crashes with raw TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'trim') in normalizeSdkCommandName; should throw a guided 'options.command is required' error. (2) createExtensionTestHarness silently accepts a non-extension module (e.g. an options object passed as the module arg) and returns an empty activation summary; should error 'module has no activate export'. Never-block: SDK helpers must guide, not crash.

value.author: maintainer-agent
value.text: Fix implemented (uncommitted): normalizeSdkCommandName throws a guided 'pass options.command' error on non-string input (covers positional misuse); createExtensionTestHarness now calls assertTestModuleHasActivateExport (module.activate or default.activate function, loader parity) and rejects with 'no activate export' instead of returning an empty harness. Tests added in sdk-index.spec (positional misuse, non-module object, string, default-export parity). 117 sdk-index tests pass.

patch.value: Guided errors in src/sdk/testing.ts for non-string command names and missing activate exports
SDK test helpers fail with actionable guidance instead of crashing
117 SDK spec tests pass incl. new validation cases

SDK testing-helper input validation shipped: normalizeSdkCommandName guides positional misuse, createExtensionTestHarness asserts activate export with loader parity; sdk-index + testing-runners specs green (117 tests).
